_currentDelegationsExample._note: After the admin submits the epoch-629 delegation tx and it settles, this is what currentDelegations looks like.

_inFlightChangesExample._note: After the admin submits a tx but before epoch 629, inFlightChanges looks like this. The agent settles it automatically once activeFromEpoch <= current epoch.

_completedChangesExample._note: Once a change settles (activeFromEpoch <= currentEpoch), the agent moves it here automatically. It is a permanent log of every past delegation action.
